name: mojo-overload-disambiguation-with-is-defined
description: Pattern for adding 1-arg auto-detecting overloads in Mojo without ambiguity: use is_defined for compile-time platform detection and remove defaults from the explicit N-arg overload. Use when: (1) adding a convenience overload that auto-detects a parameter via compile-time constants, (2) avoiding 'ambiguous call' errors when both overloads share the same leading parameters, (3) detecting Apple Silicon or other platform traits at compile time in Mojo 0.26.1.
